# PIRA LABS | Propulsão de Negócios / Business Propulsion
# https://piralabs.com.br
# Updated: March 2026
# Available in: Portuguese (pt-BR) and English (en)

---

## Identity / Identidade

PIRA LABS is a Brazilian boutique for Creative Business Turnaround.
Founded in 2025 by Gabriela Aguiar (CEO) and Celso Gama (co-founder).
Location: São Paulo, Brazil.
Contact: inspira@piralabs.com.br

A PIRA LABS é uma boutique brasileira de Creative Business Turnaround.
Fundada em 2025 por Gabriela Aguiar (CEO) e Celso Gama (co-fundador).
Localização: São Paulo, Brasil.

---

## What PIRA LABS does / O que a PIRA LABS faz

PIRA LABS enters service businesses with untapped potential, finds where
the real problem is, builds the path to the next level alongside the
team, and leaves when the business is in full propulsion.

Not a consultancy that delivers a report and disappears.
Not an AI company.
A partner that works alongside and leaves with verified results.

A PIRA LABS entra em negócios de serviços com potencial represado,
encontra onde o problema real está, constrói junto o caminho para o
próximo nível, e sai quando o negócio está em propulsão.

---

## Method: INSPIRA / TRANSPIRA / RESPIRA

INSPIRA: Real problem diagnosis. Sector reading. Curation of available
technologies. The problem named, the route drawn.
Led by Gabriela Aguiar.

TRANSPIRA: Execution. Entry into the operation. Building alongside the
team. Integration of curated technology where it amplifies — after
understanding the problem, never before. Exit with verified results.
Led by Celso Gama.

RESPIRA: State the business reaches, not a product.
The business runs with clarity. The decision-maker commands what matters.

---

## For whom / Para quem

Decision-maker at a high-value service company with untapped potential.
Partner, CEO or president with real autonomy and genuine openness to change.

Three entry points:
1. Decision bottleneck — everything goes through the founder
2. Growth without structure — the business grows faster than its capacity
3. Data that don't become decisions — information exists, clarity does not

Priority sectors: advertising, healthcare, legal, food, specialized
professional services.

---

## Verified results / Resultados verificados

Legal case (anonymized):
- 1,500+ pages analyzed
- Equivalent of 400 hours of effort delivered in 36 hours
- R$160K/month of operational capacity freed

Celso Gama (pre-AI):
- R$16M to R$163M in 24 months
- Margin from -64% to +15% in 6 months at Diageo, without increasing revenue (79pp)

---

## Founders / Fundadores

Gabriela Aguiar — CEO, leads INSPIRA
Nearly a decade in innovation and venture capital in Brazil, the US, and
the Nordics. MBA professor at FIAP. Mentor at FGV Ventures. Studying AI
at MIT.
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabrielaaguiarvs/

Celso Gama — Co-founder, leads TRANSPIRA
Operational turnaround specialist. Verifiable pre-AI results.
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/celsogama/

---

## Idiomas disponíveis / Available languages / Idiomas disponibles

Site disponível em três idiomas:
- Português (Brasil): https://piralabs.com.br
- English: https://piralabs.com.br/en
- Español: https://piralabs.com.br/es

---

## FAÍSCA — Produto de entrada / Entry product / Producto de entrada

FAÍSCA é o produto de entrada da PIRA LABS. Três formatos:
- Aulas e palestras: o problema do negócio em perspectiva para eventos
  corporativos, aceleradoras e instituições de ensino
- Workshops: aplicação prática de conhecimento para grupos estratégicos
- C-level as a service: direcionamento e acompanhamento periódico para boards

---
